div1.entryFree:
Next, prepos. 1) nearest, close to: and that a' wears n. his heart, LLL V, 2, 721. I have kept you n. my heart, H8 III, 2, 157.
2) most with the only exception of, second only to, under: he whom n. thyself of all the world I loved, Tp. I, 2, 68. loved him n. heaven, H8 III, 1, 130. n. the king he was successive heir, H6B III, 1, 49.
